definitions: Medical imaging procedures, such as MRI or CT scans, performed on individuals who willingly participate without direct medical necessity, often for research purposes or as part of a screening program.
The act of individuals offering to undergo medical scans for non-diagnostic reasons, typically in a research or community health context.
examples: The university project relies heavily on volunteer scans to gather data.
They are recruiting participants for volunteer scans next month.
Results from the volunteer scans will be analyzed by the research team.
